title: prasoxylon excelsum
intro: Prasoxylon excelsum, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae and is native to the southern parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Prasoxylon excelsum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Prasoxylon excelsum is commonly prepared as a dried root or capsule, and can also be consumed as a tea or added to herbal supplements.
